_comment: Claude Desktop MCP configuration for mcp-local-dev-toolbox.
_instructions: Add the 'mcpServers' block below to your Claude Desktop config file.
Replace /absolute/path/to/mcp-local-dev-toolbox with the actual path where you cloned this repo.
Replace /absolute/path/to/your/project with the root of the project you want the agent to access.
ALLOW_WRITES controls whether the agent can write files.
Set to 'true' only when you want the agent to be able to edit files.
Omit it or set to 'false' for read-only access (git, search, test-running still work).
